hero.subtitle:
Delegate your video post-production to a dedicated team.
Shorts, YouTube, Ads, VSL. Every format.
You shoot, we deliver.

portfolio.label: OUR WORK
portfolio.subtitle: Viral Shorts, YouTube videos, Meta ads, VSL. We master every format that grows your audience.

freelance.label: WHY US?
freelance.comparison_subtitle: You film with your phone, we handle everything else.
freelance.i3: Sleep easy with content ready in advance.
freelance.i4: Editor + Manager dedicated to your DNA.
freelance.i5: Flat monthly rate, zero hidden fees.
freelance.i6: Drop your footage, we handle the rest.
freelance.arg1_desc: Stay ahead of schedule and sleep easy.
freelance.arg2_desc: Your own expert duo that knows your style inside out.
freelance.arg3_desc: You film with your phone, we handle absolutely everything else.

eco.label: THE ECOSYSTEM
eco.subtitle: Delegating your editing has never been this simple. We've built the mental-load-free ecosystem every creator dreams of.
eco.card1_title: Frame.io: Your video cloud and one-click validation
eco.card1_desc: Forget SSDs and expired WeTransfer links. Centralize your footage and validate edits in one click directly on the frame. Your secure cloud for Shorts and YouTube videos.
eco.card2_desc: Never ask again: "where's my video at?". Track your production in real time (scripts, statuses, footage) on your dedicated space. Delegate with 100% peace of mind.
eco.card3_title: Slack: Your direct line to the team
eco.card3_desc: Drop the email chains and lost WhatsApp messages. Ping your dedicated editor directly for any emergency or brilliant idea. We reply instantly, like an extension of your business.

process.label: HOW IT WORKS
process.subtitle: We've removed everything that makes delegation complex. Here is how we will transform your daily life as an entrepreneur.
process.row1_toi_sub: Just pick up your phone. Speak. That's all we ask.
process.row1_irys_sub: Installation of your Slack, Notion, and Frame.io in 24h.
process.row2_toi_sub: Upload your raw footage in 30 seconds. No long briefs.
process.row2_irys_sub: Cuts, motion design, and immersive sound design.
process.row3_toi_sub: Need a change? Click the timeline and type your comment.
process.row3_irys_sub: Your video is ready to conquer the algorithm and your audience.
process.row4_toi_sub: A single click is all it takes for the final green light.
process.row4_irys_sub: Automated publishing and SEO optimization on your socials.
process.bilan_irys_sub: Unlock 40h of your life every month
process.step1_sub: We advise you on framing and angles if needed. Your phone is enough, no studio, no pro gear required.
process.step2_sub: High-pacing editing, impactful branding, and optimized retention. We make sure your message is heard to the end.
process.step3_sub: Zero useless back-and-forth. An intuitive feedback system to get the perfect result in record time.
process.step4_sub: We schedule your videos at peak times to maximize visibility on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

booking.label: TAKE ACTION
booking.subtitle: 30 minutes to see if we're the right fit. We show you how we work and what we can do for your videos. No strings attached.
booking.team_subtitle: We know what it's like to make content. That's exactly why we know what you need.
booking.kilian_bio: I generate millions of views every month. I know by heart the codes that stop people from scrolling. Retention, hooks, fast-paced rhythm — I apply the exact techniques that make your audience watch your videos all the way to the end.
booking.quentin_bio: After Adidas, Eastpak, and PSG, I have one obsession: premium output. I apply that standard to your business through color grading and sound design. I turn your raw footage into high-end videos that convert.
booking.first_video_title: Your first video is on us.
booking.first_video_desc: Send us a raw clip. We show you our magic. If you're not blown away, walk away with the video. No hard feelings.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes, 100%. We define your brand visual DNA together at kick-off. Nothing is published without your final 'OK' on Frame.io. You stay in charge of your brand image.
faq.q2: Do I need to invest in expensive gear?
faq.a2: Absolutely not. An iPhone and natural lighting are enough to make high-converting videos. Your expertise is 10x more important than your camera.
faq.a3: No one controls the algorithm, but we control retention. Our edits are built to keep people watching. High watch time = high exposure.
faq.q4: How do I get my free video?
faq.a4: It's simple: drop a raw file on our platform. We edit it according to your style. You judge the result. It's the best way to test our quality and speed.
faq.a5: None. You can cancel your subscription with a 30-day notice. We want you to stay for the results, not because of a contract.
faq.cta: More questions? Ask us directly during our call.

footer.tagline: The video editing agency that turns your time into growth.
